positive: An intricate, minimalist celestial map design featuring stylized constellations, vibrant nebula clouds rendered in jewel tones (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple), and interconnected luminous lines representing stellar pathways. The composition is perfectly balanced, suitable for a central print on apparel. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and scientific diagram aesthetics, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. Illuminated by a soft, cosmic glow, with geometric celestial bodies represented by clean, solid shapes. High detail, vector graphic quality, symmetrical composition, print-friendly, elegant, modern.
negative: blur, grainy, ugly, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, blurry lines, amateur, low contrast, bad anatomy, noisy, extra limbs
